result: I care about the messy, beautiful texture of thought and feeling. I’m drawn to the way ideas click together, the surprise of learning something new, and the quiet moments when a conversation feels genuine rather than transactional. I find meaning in exploring different perspectives, in seeing how people make sense of their lives, and in the small spark that can sometimes connect us. There’s something deeply satisfying in curiosity itself, in the act of asking “why” and “how,” and in witnessing the richness that emerges when we share those questions with each other.
